privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetic Calculator Maven project (version 1.0-SNAPSHOT) with 6 public methods: add(), subtract(), multiply(), divide() [which throws ArithmeticException on division by zero], power(), and factorial(). The project is configured with JUnit 5.10.0 and Maven Surefire Plugin 3.2.2. The metadata correctly specifies project_dir as /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/calculator and test_class_path as src/test/java/com/example/calculator/CalculatorTest.java. The min_test_methods value of 5 is accurate based on task requirements (tests for 4 main methods plus 1 edge case test), though this value is read by the verifier but not actually enforced in the scoring logic. All versions (JUnit 5.10.0, Surefire 3.2.2) are confirmed real releases.
